debug_info.goal:
case neg
x : IGame
p : Player
z : IGame
hy : z ∈ moves p x
h : ¬@IGame.Reversible x z p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
intro hr
    cases p
    · rw [reversible_left] at h hr ⊢
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := hr
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨w₁, hw₁, w₂, hw₂, rfl⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hle
      exact h ⟨w₁, hw₁, (unreverse_equiv w₂).symm.le.trans hle |>.trans_lf (subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hw₁ hw₂ |>.lf) |>.le_of_lt⟩
    · rw [reversible_right] at h hr ⊢
      obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := hr
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
      obtain ⟨w₁, hw₁, w₂, hw₂, rfl⟩ := hw
      rw [unreverse_equiv, unreverse_equiv] at hle
      exact h ⟨w₁, hw₁, (unreverse_equiv w₂).le.trans hle |>.lf_trans (subposition_of_mem_reverseSet hw₁ hw₂ |>.lf) |>.le_of_lt'⟩
termination_by x
decreasing_by igame_wf

intro hrev
    obtain ⟨w, hw, hle⟩ := hrev.choose_spec
    rw [moves_unreverse] at hw
    obtain ⟨y', hy', v, hv, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 hw
    apply h
    cases p
    · exact ⟨y', hy', (unreverse_equiv v).le.trans hle⟩
    · exact ⟨y', hy', hle.trans (unreverse_equiv v).ge⟩

intro ⟨w, hw, hle⟩
    rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
    obtain ⟨w, hw, v, hv, rfl⟩ := hw
    have hle' : v ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv v).trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
    rw [reverseSet] at hv
    split_ifs at hv with h'
    · cases p
      · exact (lf_right hv).not_le (hle'.trans h' .le_choose)
      · exact (lf_left hv).not_le (h'.choose_le.trans hle')
    · subst hv
